title: U.S. allows temporary purchases of Russian oil already at sea to stabilize energy markets
summary: The U.S. has temporarily authorized the purchase of Russian oil stranded at sea to stabilize energy markets.

summary: Heading in the spring home selling season, buyers should know what their options are before locking in an interest rate for a new mortgage, experts say.

title: The Largest Oil Supply Shock in History
summary: The IEA estimates that at least 10 million bpd of supply has already been shut in, making it the largest disruption the oil market has ever faced. title: Oil Prices Dip as U.S. Opens Brief Window for Stranded Russian Crude

title: Why China’s renminbi push matters even if it never rivals the dollar
